subcodes.title: Mono
subcodes.first_line:
## Mono

Nu vo ada han e cuda e Tanawa Tanawa e wap pie-it nush ta Weed cada my a too Wee a Ma tu queet me quash  me qua
subcodes.notes: Theory: Mono (California indigenous) prayer (section header: Mono). Opening: "Nu vo ada han e cuda e Tanawa Tanawa e wap pie-it nush ta Weed cada my a too Wee a Ma tu queet me quash..." No English translation available. Challenge: Mono is a critically endangered California Uto-Aztecan language with minimal documentation.
